race.comment: COCCINELLA (2) travelled further back than usual last start after copping an early check but rallied late to be beaten around two lengths over 1250m at Ballina. Suited over the extra 100m this afternoon. Perfectly drawn and gets his chance to break the ice. ENGLISH CONQUEROR (3) registered a fourth minor placing from nine starts when third over this trip at Doomben 16 days ago. Three winners and four placegetters have come from that race which gives merit to the performance. Will be hard to hold out. CAPTIVATE LEGEND (10) raced handy and battled on well for second last start over 1300m at the Gold Coast. Cherry ripe after three runs back and should be about the mark again. HELL OF A HIGH (13) improved sharply with a step up in distance last time out. Sparingly raced and capable of testing this field. The interesting runner is SHREWDNESS (7) first-up from a spell for a new stable. Came good at the end of last prep with a couple of placings. Recent trial winner who looks up for this.
